title: baccharis linearifolia subsp. linearifolia
intro: Baccharis linearifolia subsp. linearifolia, also known as River Saltbush, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin conditions, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Baccharis linearifolia subsp. linearifolia can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
